title: Illinois Tool Works (ITW)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Illinois Tool Works using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what ITW is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-6iemhbu4>
ITW's top line grows slowly, roughly 1-3% organically. However, its decentralized operating model and 80/20 front-to-back philosophy consistently drive margin improvements. A 5% FCF growth rate strikes a balance between sluggish industrial end-markets and ITW's operational excellence.
